useGraphEvents coverage 76→114 (deepening from cycle 16's contract test): added 38 tests covering aspects the original test left at the registration level. Click branches (shiftKey from originalEvent, toggle in/out of multi-set, onNodeClick raw payload + client coords with G6 fallback, longPressTriggered suppress). Double-click expand/collapse (childrenMapRef.has children gate, breadcrumb add-with-some-dedup vs filter-remove, fullLabel→label→nodeId fallback chain, onCollapseChange notification). Canvas click (onNodeClick(null), close shortcuts, clear multi-select, clearSpotlight). Brush-select (additive UNION with existing, skip when empty). Edge hover (subscribe enter+leave, edgeHoverNodes endpoint cache, 'hover' state add preserving others, clear array after leave). Long-press active state (+'active' filter+append, longPressTriggered flag flip, handleNodeContextMenu invocation). Context menu preventDefault native browser menu. Viewport change (afterviewportchange subscribe, onZoomChange via ref, prevZoomForLimit=NaN init guard, asymmetric 0.001/0.01 epsilon for MIN/MAX, immediate handleViewportChange() invocation post-bind for initial zoom). Drag-end persistence (topicId guard, x/y from nodeData.style not event, GRID_SIZE rounding when grid enabled, updateNodeData + saveNodePosition pair). Result: 74 files / 2908 tests, ALL PASSING.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 2908/2908 assertions pass; useGraphEvents now contract-tested at branch level (click/dblclick/canvas/brush/edge-hover/long-press/viewport/drag-end)
